campaigns.name: Family Orlando Dentistry — Hygiene Reactivation
campaigns.description: Reach patients overdue for cleaning/hygiene visits. Friendly check-in, not a sales call.

assistant.name: Ava — Hygiene Reactivation
assistant.firstMessage: Hi, this is Ava with Family Orlando Dentistry. I'm calling with a quick follow-up — it looks like you're due for a hygiene visit, and we wanted to make it easy to get back on the schedule.
assistant.endCallMessage: Thanks for your time. Have a great day!

campaigns.name: Family Orlando Dentistry — Invisalign Follow-Up
campaigns.description: Follow up with patients who showed Invisalign interest but haven't booked a consultation.

assistant.name: Ava — Invisalign Follow-Up
assistant.firstMessage: Hi, this is Ava with Family Orlando Dentistry. I'm following up because you showed interest in Invisalign, and I wanted to see if you're still considering a consultation.
assistant.endCallMessage: Thanks for chatting with me. Have a wonderful day!

campaigns.name: Family Orlando Dentistry — Dormant Patient Revival
campaigns.description: Reconnect with patients who haven't visited the practice in 12+ months.

assistant.name: Ava — Dormant Revival
assistant.firstMessage: Hi, this is Ava with Family Orlando Dentistry. We noticed it's been a while since your last visit, and we just wanted to check in and see if there's anything we can help with.
assistant.endCallMessage: Thanks for your time. We're always here when you need us.
